# Chaos UI - LLM-Optimized Documentation

This document provides structured information for Large Language Models (LLMs) to understand and use the Chaos UI component library.

## Project Overview

**Name**: Chaos UI
**Version**: 0.1.0
**Type**: Enterprise UI Component Library
**Tech Stack**: React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Tailwind CSS 4, @base-ui/react, shadcn/ui, Lucide React
**Documentation**: Storybook 10 with MDX

## Import Patterns

```typescript
// UI Components
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"

// Business Components
import { DataTable } from "@/components/business/data-table"
import { StatusTag } from "@/components/business/status-tag"
import { KPIPanel } from "@/components/business/kpi-panel"

// Mobile Components
import { MobileButton } from "@/components/business/mobile-button"
import { MobileInput } from "@/components/business/mobile-input"
import { MobileDialog } from "@/components/business/mobile-dialog"
import { MobileDataTable } from "@/components/business/mobile-data-table"
import { MobileDashboardLayout } from "@/components/business/mobile-dashboard-layout"

// Responsive Preview
import { ResponsivePreview } from "@/components/business/responsive-preview"

// Utilities
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
```

## UI Components (60)

### Form Controls
- **Button**: `default | secondary | destructive | outline | ghost | link` variants, `xs | sm | default | lg | icon | icon-xs | icon-sm | icon-lg` sizes
- **Input**: text, email, password, number, search, tel, url types
- **Textarea**: Multi-line text input
- **Select**: Dropdown selection with groups
- **Checkbox**: Boolean checkbox with label
- **RadioGroup**: Single selection from options
- **Switch**: Toggle on/off state, `sm | default` sizes
- **ColorPicker**: Color selection with hex output

### Data Display
- **Card**: Container with `default | sm` sizes, has CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction
- **Badge**: Small status indicator with `default | secondary | destructive | outline | ghost | link` variants
- **Avatar**: User avatar with image and fallback
- **Table**: Standard HTML table
- **Alert**: Notification with `default | destructive` variants
- **Skeleton**: Loading placeholder
- **Progress**: Progress bar `0-100`
- **EmptyState**: Empty state placeholder
- **Sonner**: Toast notifications
- **Timeline**: Vertical timeline
- **KPI Panel**: Key metrics display

### Navigation
- **Tabs**: Tabbed interface, `default | line` variants
- **Breadcrumb**: Navigation breadcrumb
- **Pagination**: Page navigation
- **NavigationMenu**: Top navigation
- **Sidebar**: Side navigation
- **Stepper**: Step indicator
- **DropdownMenu**: Dropdown menu
- **Command**: Command palette (cmdk)
- **Toggle**: Toggle button
- **ToggleGroup**: Group of toggles

### Overlays
- **Dialog**: Modal dialog
- **AlertDialog**: Confirmation dialog
- **Sheet**: Side sheet
- **Drawer**: Bottom drawer
- **Popover**: Floating popover
- **Tooltip**: Hover tooltip
- **HoverCard**: Hover preview card
- **Accordion**: Collapsible sections
- **Collapsible**: Single collapsible

### Layout & Input
- **Separator**: Horizontal/vertical divider
- **ScrollArea**: Custom scrollable area
- **Label**: Form field label
- **InputGroup**: Input with addons
- **TagsInput**: Tag input
- **FileUpload**: File upload component
- **Calendar**: Date picker (react-day-picker)
- **Pagination**: Page numbers
- **FormWizard**: Multi-step form

### Advanced Components
- **BrowseInput**: Input with browse dialog
- **UserBrowse**: User selection dialog
- **DepartmentBrowse**: Tree-based department selection
- **TreeView**: Hierarchical tree display
- **TreeSelect**: Tree-based select
- **FormSection**: Collapsible form section
- **FormGrid**: Responsive form grid
- **FormList**: Dynamic form list
- **GridLayout**: CSS grid layout
- **SplitPane**: Resizable split panes
- **PageContainer**: Page layout container
- **VirtualList**: Virtual scrolling list
- **VirtualTable**: Virtual scrolling table

## Business Components (14)

- **ActivityFeed**: Activity stream display
- **AdvancedDataTable**: Feature-rich data table
- **Chart**: LineChart, BarChart, AreaChart, PieChart (recharts)
- **DataTable**: Simple data table
- **EmptyState**: Empty placeholder
- **FileUploadManager**: File upload management
- **FilterBuilder**: Advanced filtering
- **FormField**: Form field wrapper
- **FormWizard**: Multi-step form
- **KanbanBoard**: Drag-drop kanban
- **KPICard**: Single KPI card
- **PageHeader**: Page header
- **StatCard**: Statistics card
- **StatusTag**: Status badge

## Layout Components (3)

- **AuthLayout**: Authentication page layout
- **DashboardLayout**: Dashboard page layout
- **DetailLayout**: Detail page layout

## Mobile Components (20)

Mobile-optimized components for responsive design. All mobile components use larger touch targets (h-12, px-4, text-base) and adapt to desktop (h-8, px-2.5, text-sm).

### Form Controls
- **MobileButton**: Full-width mobile button with h-12 touch target
- **MobileInput**: Mobile-optimized input with larger padding
- **MobileTextarea**: Mobile-optimized textarea with min-height
- **MobileSelect**: Mobile-optimized select dropdown

### Data Display
- **MobileDataTable**: Card-based table layout for mobile
- **MobileKPICard**: Mobile-optimized KPI metrics card
- **MobileCard**: Simplified card for mobile screens
- **MobileEmptyState**: Mobile-optimized empty state

### Overlays
- **MobileDialog**: Full-screen dialog on mobile, modal on desktop
- **MobileSheet**: Bottom sheet with 80vh height on mobile

### Forms
- **MobileForm**: Mobile form with increased spacing
- **MobileFormField**: Form field with larger label spacing
- **MobileFormWizard**: Mobile-optimized multi-step form
- **MobileFilterBuilder**: Mobile filter with larger inputs

### Navigation
- **MobilePageHeader**: Sticky header with back/menu buttons
- **MobileNavigation**: Horizontal scrollable navigation
- **MobileTabs**: Full-width tabs with scroll support
- **MobileKanban**: Mobile kanban with narrower columns

### Layouts
- **MobileDashboardLayout**: Mobile dashboard with sticky header
- **MobileAuthLayout**: Centered auth layout for mobile

### Preview
- **ResponsivePreview**: Responsive preview container for testing

## Design Tokens

### Colors (CSS Variables)
```
--background, --foreground
--card, --card-foreground
--primary, --primary-foreground
--secondary, --secondary-foreground
--muted, --muted-foreground
--accent, --accent-foreground
--destructive, --destructive-foreground
--success, --success-foreground
--warning, --warning-foreground
--info, --info-foreground
--border, --input, --ring
--surface, --surface-foreground
--brand-50 through --brand-950
--chart-1 through --chart-5 (blue, green, orange, purple, yellow)
```

### Spacing
- p-1 (4px), p-2 (8px), p-3 (12px), p-4 (16px), p-6 (24px), p-8 (32px)

### Border Radius
- rounded-sm (radius * 0.6)
- rounded-md (radius * 0.8)
- rounded-lg (radius)
- rounded-xl (radius * 1.4)
- rounded-full (9999px)

### Component Sizes
- xs: h-6 (24px)
- sm: h-7 (28px)
- default: h-8 (32px)
- lg: h-9 (36px)

## Common Patterns

### Button Variants
```tsx
<Button variant="default">Primary</Button>
<Button variant="secondary">Secondary</Button>
<Button variant="destructive">Destructive</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
<Button variant="link">Link</Button>
```

### Form Field Pattern
```tsx
<div className="space-y-2">
  <Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
  <Input id="email" type="email" placeholder="Enter email" />
  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Helper text</p>
</div>
```

### Card Pattern
```tsx
<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Content here</CardContent>
  <CardFooter>Footer actions</CardFooter>
</Card>
```

### Status Tag Pattern
```tsx
<StatusTag status="approved" /> // approved, pending, rejected, completed, draft, cancelled
```

## Best Practices

1. Use semantic color tokens (bg-primary), not raw colors
2. Use cn() utility for class name merging
3. Always provide data-slot attribute
4. Support focus-visible, disabled, aria-invalid states
5. Support dark mode with dark: prefix
6. Use cva for variant definitions
7. Use named exports
8. Add TypeScript types for all props
9. Include JSDoc comments for AI understanding

## File Locations

- UI Components: `components/ui/[name].tsx`
- Business Components: `components/business/[name].tsx`
- Layout Components: `components/layout/[name].tsx`
- Stories: `src/components/[Name].stories.tsx`
- MDX Docs: `src/components/[Name].mdx`

## Version

- React: 19.2.7
- Next.js: 16.2.9
- Tailwind CSS: 4.3.0
- TypeScript: 5.9.3
- Storybook: 10.4.3
